note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Structural Drying Practitioner — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: A dehumidifier contributes to drying by…
options: Lowering the vapour pressure/humidity of the air so materials release moisture
Create airflow across wet surfaces at a shallow angle, moving the boundary layer
Blow toward the dehumidifier intake only

questions.questionText: On an Australian site, drying equipment power planning must respect…
options: 230 V mains and the amperage each circuit (e.g. 10 A / 15 A) can safely carry

questions.questionText: The drying goal is set by…
options: The dry standard taken from unaffected materials
Prove drying is progressing and trigger adjustment when it stalls

questions.questionText: An RCD (safety switch) on portable drying gear is…
options: A required electrical-safety control, tested before use
